source: aced.gg dev blog 2021-03-28 (Dragons/Midgame) + Dungeons wiki page — DOCUMENTED

bosses.name: Treesmasher
bosses.note: Boss of COLLAPSED WOODS (Medium). 'Dormant' until awoken.

bosses.name: Shadowscale
bosses.note: Boss of SHROUDED SANCTUM (Medium). Hides secrets.

bosses.name: Devoted Shaman + Reptilian God
bosses.note: SACRIFICIAL GROUNDS (Medium): the Devoted Shaman's reptilian hunters try to sacrifice players to a 'Reptilian God'.

bosses.name: Firebreather
bosses.note: Lord of FLAMING HEARTH (fire dragon). See aced_FlamingHearth.

bosses.name: Riverborn
bosses.note: Lord of RIVERSIDE REFUGE (aqua dragon). See aced_RiversideRefuge.

bosses.name: Tombstone Carrier
bosses.note: Boss of TOMB OF DECAYING DEATH. See aced_TombOfDecayingDeath.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED world structure: RotF dungeons ('worlds') are tiered EASY / MEDIUM / HARD. Closed Testing had 6 Easy + 4 Hard worlds; MEDIUM = 6 worlds (in pipeline): (1) Flaming Hearth [Firebreather], (2) Riverside Refuge [Riverborn], (3) Collapsed Woods [Treesmasher], (4) Shrouded Sanctum [Shadowscale], (5) Tomb of Decaying Death [Tombstone Carrier], (6) Sacrificial Grounds [Devoted Shaman -> Reptilian God]. The FOUR ELEMENTAL DRAGONS return from legacy as realm LORDS (Firebreather=fire, Riverborn=water; +2 others=earth/air). 'Lord' bosses are found by exploring the realm for their lair, then a dungeon opens. EASY worlds (from Dungeons wiki): Pirate Cave, Forest Maze, Spider Den, Forbidden Jungle, The Hive.
uncertain: The 2 remaining elemental dragons (earth/air Lords) not named in this post. HARD-rank roster (beyond Gate to the Underworld) partly unknown. This is the 2021 ACED design — original 2019 server roster overlapped but differed.
confidence: HIGH for the Medium-world list + bosses + tier structure (DOCUMENTED); informs the whole dungeon-build plan.
